Update.NotRequired: If the program is still working with your version of osu!, you do not need to update yet.

Will merge collections into existing collection.db at export location, if it is found.
Place collection.db in export directory before export if merge is desired.

Config.MergeCaseDisabled: Collections will not be merged, all collections are preserved.

ExportFormat.BeatmapDesc: Beatmaps will be exported in osu! archive format (.osz).
ExportFormat.AudioDesc: Beatmap audio files will be renamed, tagged and exported (original or .mp3 format).
ExportFormat.BackgroundDesc: Only beatmap background images will be exported (original format).
ExportFormat.ReplayDesc: Player score replays will be exported (.osr).
ExportFormat.SkinsDesc: ALL skins will be exported (.osk). Filters will not be checked.
ExportFormat.FolderDesc: Beatmaps will be exported as an unarchived "Songs" folder ready for use with osu! stable.
ExportFormat.CollectionDbDesc: Collections will be exported as the collection.db file used by osu! stable. Beatmap filters will still be applied.
Sort.Title: Song Title
Sort.Author: Mapper Name
Filter.Author: Beatmap author
Filter.StarRatingDetail:
Selects beatmaps by their in-game star rating.
For example, input '6.3' to only export beatmaps 6.3 stars or harder, or negate this filter to only export beatmaps 6.3 stars or easier.
Filter.LengthDetail:
Selects beatmaps which are longer/shorter than a given number of seconds.
For example, input '90' to only export beatmaps 90 seconds or more, or negate this filter to only export beatmaps 90 seconds or less.
Filter.AuthorDetail:
Selects beatmaps by matching the beatmap creator.
If multiple mappers are desired, separate author names with a comma (,).
For example, 'RLC, Nathan' would export beatmaps by either beatmap creator.
Negating this filter would exclude specific beatmap authors from export.
Filter.IdDetail:
Selects beatmaps with a specific beatmap ID.
If you want to match multiple IDs, seperate IDs with a comma (,).
Filter.BPMDetail:
Selects beatmaps with songs above/below a given BPM.
For example, input '180' to only export beatmaps 180 BPM or above, or negate the filter to only export beatmaps 180 BPM or below.
Filter.SinceDetail:
Selects beatmap sets using the time since they were added to your osu!lazer. This is only as accurate as the date that osu! has recorded.
For example, input '8:00' to only export beatmaps added within the last 8 hours.
Input '4' to only export beatmaps added within the last 4 days, or negate this filter to only export beatmaps added more than 4 days ago.
Filter.RankedDetail:
Selects beatmap sets using the time since they were ranked.
For example, input '30' to only export beatmaps ranked in the last 30 days, or negate this filter to export beatmaps ranked more than 30 days ago.
Filter.ArtistDetail:
Selects beatmaps by matching the song artist (as tagged within osu!).
If multiple artists are desired, separate artist names with a comma (,).
For example, 'Camellia, Nanahira' would export beatmaps by either artist.
Negating this filter would exclude specific artists from export.
Filter.TagDetail:
Selects beatmaps which have specific tags (as assigned by the beatmap author).
If multiple tags are desired, separate tags wth a comma (,).
For example, inputting 'touhou' would only export beatmaps with the tag 'touhou'.
Negating this filter would exclude specific tags from export.
Filter.GamemodeDetail:
Selects beatmaps which are created for a specific gamemode.
Negating this filter would exclude those gamemode beatmaps from export.
Filter.StatusDetail:
Selects beatmaps with a specific osu! online status.
Negating this filter would exclude maps with that status from export.
Filter.PlayedDetail:
Selected beatmaps using the time that you last played them.
For example, input 12:00 to only export beatmaps that you played within the last 12 hours.
Input '30' to only export beatmaps you have played within the last 30 days, or negate this filter to export all beatmaps which you have not played in the last 30 days.
Use the "Beatmap played ever" filter instead if you want to select all played/unplayed beatmaps.
Filter.EverPlayedDetail:
Selects beatmaps that have been played at least once (yes), or only unplayed beatmaps (no).
The "yes, with all diffs" option will export ALL difficulties of a beatmap set if any difficulty has been played.
Filter.CollectionDetail: Selects beatmaps contained within a specific collection.
Filter.ErrorGamemode: Unknown osu! game mode. Use osu, mania, ctb, or taiko.
Filter.ErrorStatus: Unknown beatmap status. Use graveyard, leaderboard, ranked, approved, qualified, or loved.
Filter.ErrorPlayed: Invalid beatmap played selection. Use "yes" for played beatmaps, or "no" for unplayed beatmaps.

CLI.AdvancedSettings:
--- Advanced export settings ---
* indicates a setting that has been changed.
CLI.CompressionEnabled: .osz/.osk compression is enabled (slow export, smaller file sizes)*
CLI.MergeEnabled: collection.db merging is enabled (merges collections into an existing collection.db at the export location)
CLI.MergeDisabled: collection.db merging is disabled (does not merge, always fully overwrites any collection.db at export location)*
CLI.MergeCaseInsensitive: collection.db merging is case-insensitive (collections with the same name with different capitalisation are merged)
CLI.MergeCaseSensitive: collection.db merging is case-sensitive (all collections are preserved)*
CLI.AudioMp3Only: audio files will be exported as .mp3 ONLY. If FFmpeg is available, other formats will be transcoded. If not, other formats will be skipped
CLI.AudioOriginal: audio files will be exported in their original file format*
CLI.CompressionDisabledMsg: - CHANGED: .osz output compression has been disabled.
CLI.CompressionEnabledMsg: - CHANGED: .osz output compression has been enabled.
CLI.MergeDisabledMsg: - CHANGED: collection.db merging has been disabled.
CLI.MergeEnabledMsg: - CHANGED: collection.db merging has been enabled.
CLI.AudioAsIsMsg: - CHANGED: all audio files will be exported as-is.
CLI.AudioMp3OnlyMsg: - CHANGED: audio files will export as .mp3 ONLY.
CLI.MergeCaseSensitiveMsg: - CHANGED: collection merging is now case-sensitive.
CLI.MergeCaseInsensitiveMsg: - CHANGED: collection merging is now case-insensitive.
CLI.FilterHelpText:
Only beatmaps which match ALL ACTIVE FILTERS will be exported.
Prefixing the filter with "!" will negate the filter, if you want to use a "less than" filter. "!" can be used with all filters, though an example is only shown for star rating.

Examples:
- To only export beatmaps 6.3 stars and above: stars 6.3
- Below 6.3 stars (negation example, works for all filters): !stars 6.3
- Longer than 1:30 (90 seconds): length 90
- 180BPM and above: bpm 180
- Beatmaps added in the last 7 days: since 7
- Beatmaps added in the last 5 hours: since 5:00
- Beatmaps ranked in the last 30 days: ranked 30
- Specific beatmap ID (comma-separated): id 1
- Mapped by RLC or Nathan (comma-separated): author RLC, Nathan
- Specific artists (comma-separated): artist Camellia, nanahira
- Tags include "touhou": tag touhou
- Specific gamemodes: mode osu/mania/ctb/taiko
- Beatmap status: status graveyard/leaderboard/ranked/approved/qualified/loved
- Beatmap played in the last 30 days: played 30
- Beatmap has ever been played: everplayed yes
- Beatmap has ever been played (include all diffs in set): everplayed set
- Contained in a specific collection called "songs": collection songs
- Contained in a specific collection labelled #1 in the collection list: collection #1
- Remove a specific filter (using line number from list above): remove 1
- Remove all filters: reset
Back to export menu: exit
